description: Native Windows Linux-style commands with cross-shell pipeline support
post_install: Write-Host '... and more (136 commands total)' -ForegroundColor Gray
Write-Host 'WinuxCmd commands are now available!' -ForegroundColor Green
Write-Host '  1. Direct use (after shell restart):' -ForegroundColor White
Write-Host '     ls -la        grep pattern     cat file.txt' -ForegroundColor Gray
Write-Host '     winux activate    - Activates in current session' -ForegroundColor Gray
Write-Host '     winux deactivate  - Deactivates and restores aliases' -ForegroundColor Gray
Write-Host '     winux status      - Shows activation status' -ForegroundColor Gray
Write-Host '     winux list        - Lists all 136 commands' -ForegroundColor Gray
Write-Host 'Note: winux activate safely manages PowerShell alias conflicts' -ForegroundColor Cyan
notes: WinuxCmd provides Linux-style commands for Windows.
136 GNU commands automatically created as hardlinks.
winux activate safely removes conflicting PowerShell aliases
winux deactivate restores original aliases automatically
winux status shows current activation state
winux list shows all available commands
Works from any installation location (Scoop, manual, etc.)
